excerpt: OHCHR says the operations 'likely resulted in hundreds of deaths.'
transform_note: Low/best/high preserve the qualitative phrase rather than pretending to a precise count.
confidence_note: Useful as a lower-bound context claim only; not tight enough for a full episode estimate.

excerpt: OHCHR records 66,000 crossings into Bangladesh.
transform_note: Used as a displacement anchor only.
confidence_note: Strong operational figure but not enough to reconstruct month-by-month exposure.

excerpt: OHCHR records about 22,000 internally displaced.
transform_note: Used for denominator context, not mortality.
confidence_note: IDP location and timing remain coarse.

excerpt: ICC filing summarizes the 2016 wave as displacing about 87,000 to Bangladesh.
transform_note: Broader-wave displacement context; period extends beyond the late-November sub-episode.
confidence_note: Good summary figure but not enough to solve sub-episode timing.

geographic_scope: about 10 Rohingya villages in northwest Maungdaw / northwest Rakhine
excerpt: Reuters says Rohingya elders estimated 'some 600' killed.
transform_note: Preserved as a source-native estimate tied to the two-week sweep.
confidence_note: Useful mid-range 2016 figure but still not a full registry.

excerpt: Reuters reported two senior U.N. officials saying over 1,000 may have been killed.
transform_note: Kept as broader-wave upper-bound context rather than assigned to the two-week November sweep.
confidence_note: Significant but indirect and not sub-episoded.

excerpt: HRW cites the government's figure of 69 alleged militants killed.
transform_note: Retained as unknown-status in the bundle because victim status is official-claim only.
confidence_note: High risk of misclassification.

excerpt: HRW cites the government's figure of 17 security-force deaths.
transform_note: Could not cleanly allocate all 17 to the late-November sub-episode.
confidence_note: Reasonably solid for the broader 2016 wave, not the sub-episode.

excerpt: Reuters reports 'a little under 2,000 soldiers' in the area.
transform_note: Rounded into a conservative range for denominator context.
confidence_note: Still too thin for a completed 2016 PM estimate.

excerpt: Parmar et al. note ARSA killed 12 personnel on 25 August.
transform_note: Narrow same-day attack claim, useful for cross-checking Reuters.
confidence_note: Strong for the assault itself.

excerpt: Reuters says officials reported 59 insurgents killed on 25 August.
transform_note: Kept as unknown in the strict core because official insurgent labels may include mobilized villagers or misclassified civilians; used only in a case-specific sensitivity.
confidence_note: Moderate confidence for deaths occurring in armed clashes, lower confidence for exact status.

excerpt: Reuters says the military later reported 13 security-force deaths.
transform_note: Used as the strict-core military death series.
confidence_note: Reasonably solid official claim.

excerpt: Reuters reports an official claim of 376 ARSA bodies recovered.
transform_note: Retained outside the core military series because victim status is official-claim only and may embed civilians or non-core participants.
confidence_note: Low confidence on status validity.

geographic_scope: Rakhine State / Rohingya refugee households in Bangladesh
excerpt: MSF reports at least 9,000 Rohingya deaths in the first month.
transform_note: Not used in the core direct-death path because it includes nonviolent deaths.
confidence_note: High confidence as a floor for mixed mortality.

geographic_scope: Rakhine State / Rohingya refugee households in Bangladesh
excerpt: MSF gives a conservative floor of at least 6,700 violent Rohingya deaths.
transform_note: Treated as a floor-like direct-death estimate for the acute phase.
confidence_note: High confidence as a lower bound; true direct deaths may be higher.

geographic_scope: Rakhine State / Rohingya refugee households in Bangladesh
excerpt: MSF says at least 730 children under five were violently killed.
transform_note: Preserved as source-native under-five subgroup evidence; not harmonized into u15 or u18.
confidence_note: Strong lower-bound subgroup claim.

excerpt: Parmar et al. report 7,803 mixed deaths tied to the attacks and displacement.
transform_note: Useful as a broader mixed-mortality check, not a core direct-death input.; normalized null end_date to episode end_date during ingest cleanup
confidence_note: Good coverage, but period and death type are broader than the acute first-month direct-death target.

excerpt: Parmar et al. estimate 233,826 remained within northern Rakhine or were internally displaced.
transform_note: Used as one component of the exposed Rohingya baseline.; normalized null end_date to episode end_date during ingest cleanup
confidence_note: Strong denominator anchor.

geographic_scope: from the three-township belt to Bangladesh
excerpt: Parmar et al. estimate 665,101 displaced to Bangladesh.
transform_note: Used as one component of the exposed Rohingya baseline.; normalized null end_date to episode end_date during ingest cleanup
confidence_note: Strong denominator anchor.

excerpt: Parmar et al. estimate 644 Rohingya missing.
transform_note: Included in the exposed-population baseline, because they were part of the attacked population.; normalized null end_date to episode end_date during ingest cleanup
confidence_note: Moderate confidence.

excerpt: ICC says up to 11,000 soldiers plus 900 police were involved in the 2017 wave.
transform_note: Converted to one-month person-months for the acute phase.
confidence_note: Strong state-force denominator anchor.

excerpt: UNHCR update gives 313,000 cumulative arrivals by 12 September.
transform_note: Used as an internal checkpoint for dynamic civilian presence.
confidence_note: Operational figure, not a full exposure model.

excerpt: ISCG gives 430,000 cumulative arrivals by 24 September.
transform_note: Used as the end-of-window outflow anchor.
confidence_note: Operational figure, not a full exposure model.

inflicting_side: Myanmar security forces and participating non-Rohingya civilians
excerpt: ICC filing summarizes broader 2017 wave allegations as including up to 10,000 Rohingya killed.
transform_note: Stored as broad-wave context only; not used for the acute one-month direct-death estimate.
confidence_note: Good contextual ceiling, but not a tight acute-phase numerator.

geographic_scope: Kha Maung Seik village tract, northern Maungdaw Township
excerpt: Amnesty documents 99 Hindu civilians killed in two massacres in Kha Maung Seik.
transform_note: Preserved separately from the Rohingya-targeted civilian series.
confidence_note: Good side-attributed civilian-death counter-series.

geographic_scope: near Myo Thu Gyi, outskirts of Maungdaw town
excerpt: Amnesty documents six Hindu civilians killed on 26 August.
transform_note: Kept separate from the 99-death Kha Maung Seik cluster.
confidence_note: Good incident-level claim.

excerpt: Amnesty describes ARSA's core fighters as being 'in the hundreds.'
transform_note: Converted into a conservative 200/300/500 range for the case-specific sensitivity denominator.
confidence_note: Weak-to-moderate confidence; only suitable for sensitivity analysis.
